failure.symptom: Requires KittyCAD/Zoo API token. Bug confirmed via source: GenerationList.svelte fetches all pages eagerly with reactive $: if block. Fix replaces with onMount + scroll-based lazy loading (PAGES_AHEAD_TO_FETCH constant), handleScroll event for pagination, and nextPageTokens array instead of single nextPageToken.
failure.recommendation: 跳过，需 Zoo API token。Bug：列表一次性加载所有页面，fix 改为滚动懒加载
